_publications._publicationTitle: Unraveling the development of cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: we analyzed cNF innervation in 16 NF1 patients using PGP9.5 in combination with the SC marker S100β
details: Successfully identified Schwann cells in combination with PGP9.5 to analyze cNF innervation in 16 NF1 patients
